zh.lifeSummary: 當Margaret de Longland於大約1332年出生在英國薩默塞特阿生頓時，她的父親Hugh Longland11330歲，母親Margaret de Furneaux32歲。她於1355年之前與Sir John St-Barbe在英國薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於1412年在威爾士格拉莫爾根享年81歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margaret de Longland于大约1332年出生在英国薩默塞特阿生頓时，她的父亲Hugh Longland11330岁，母亲Margaret de Furneaux32岁。她于1355年之前与Sir John St-Barbe在英国薩默塞特布倫特 諾爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于1412年在威尔士格拉莫爾根享年81岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Longland
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from any of the many minor places in England called Longland(s) or Langland(s). There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname   Langlands  .

variants.name: Langland
meanings: English: topographic name from Old English lang, long ‘long’ + land ‘land’, ‘territory’.
Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Langlands
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from Langlands in Guthrie (Angus).

variants.name: Longlands
meanings: English, Scottish: variant of Longland with plural or post-medieval excrescent -s. There has probably been some confusion with the Scottish surname Langlands .

nameMeanings.name: Margaret
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

variants.name: Margareta
meanings: From the Latin form of Greek Margarītēs. See Margaret .

variants.name: Margaretta
meanings: An extremely common given name from the Middle Ages onwards, derived via Old French Marguerite and Latin Margarita from Greek Margarītēs, from margaron ‘pearl’, a word ultimately of Hebrew origin. The name was always understood to mean ‘pearl’ throughout the Middle Ages. The first St Margaret was martyred at Antioch in Pisidia during the persecution instigated by the Emperor Diocletian in the early 4th century. However, there is some doubt about her name, as the same saint is venerated in the Orthodox Church as Marina . There were several other saintly bearers of the name, including St Margaret of Scotland ( d. 1093 ), wife of King Malcolm Canmore and daughter of Edmund Ironside of England. It was also the name of the wife of Henry VI of England, Margaret of Anjou ( 1430–82 ), and of Margaret Tudor ( 1489–1541 ), sister of Henry VIII , who married James IV of Scotland and ruled as regent there after his death. See also Margery , Marjorie .

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

historicEvents.title: Wycliffe's Bible
historicEvents.description: John Wycliffe, English theologian and professor at the University of Oxford, completed a translation of the Bible from the Latin Vulgate into Middle English. This translation is known as Wycliffe's Bible and was completed around 1382.

en.lifeSummary: When Margaret de Longland was born about 1332, in Ashington, Somerset, England, her father, Hugh Longland, was 11330 and her mother, Margaret de Furneaux, was 32. She married Sir John St-Barbe before 1355, in Brent Knoll, Somerset, England. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. She died in 1412, in Glamorgan, Wales, at the age of 81.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margaret de Longland est née environ 1332, à Ashington, Somerset, Angleterre, son père, Hugh Longland, avait 11330 ans et sa mère, Margaret de Furneaux, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Sir John St-Barbe avant 1355, à Brent Knoll, Somerset, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée en 1412, à Glamorgan, Galles, à l’âge de 81 ans.

ko.lifeSummary: Margaret de Longland(이)가 대략 1332년 영국 서머세트 애신그턴에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Hugh Longland(은)는 11330세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret de Furneaux(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1355년 이전 영국 서머세트 브렌트 노에서 Sir John St-Barbe(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1412년 웨일스 글램르건에서 81세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margaret de Longland nasceu aproximadamente 1332, em Ashington, Somerset, Inglaterra, seu pai, Hugh Longland, tinha 11330 anos e sua mãe, Margaret de Furneaux, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir John St-Barbe antes 1355, em Brent Knoll, Somerset, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1412, em Glamorgan, Gales, com 81 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margaret de Longland родилась около 1332 г. в местности ашингтон, сомирсет, Англия, её отцу по имени Hugh Longland было 11330 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret de Furneaux, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir John St-Barbe перед 1355 г. в местности брент нолл, сомирсет, Англия. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Она умерла в 1412 г. в местности глэморган, Уэльс в возрасте 81 год.
